Offer. SMARTX HACKATHON 2025 Won 2nd place in SMARTX HACKATHON 2025 HACK IT ON'25 - 24-Hours Hackathon 2025 Winners of HACK IT ON’25 and get Internship Offer Samartha - 36 Hours National Level Hackathon 3rd place of Samartha – 36 Hours National Level Hackathon Void.v1- Hackathon 2025 4th place of Void.v1 – Hackathon Instaventure.Ai - A Rapid Prototyping Hackathon Winners of Instaventure.Ai – Hackathon Instaventure.Ai - A Rapid Prototyping Hackathon​ 3rd place of Instaventure.Ai – Hackathon Semester - Long Internship, IIT Bombay Successfully completed a semester-long internship at IIT Bombay. TamilNadu Global Startup Contest Top 5 in the Innovators Pitch Contest StartupTN Hackathon Winners of StartupTN Hackathon 2025 with cash prize 25,000. HackFest 2025 Winners of HackfFest 2025 with cash prize 15,000. ABB Engineerd X Hackthon'25 Winners of ABB Engineerd X Hackthon with cash prize 1,20,000 and Internship Offer HackXelerate Winners of 24 Hours National Level Hackthon with cash prize 20000. Hackthon - Nandha College Winners of 24 Hours Hackthon with cash prize 1000. Hackastorm 2k25 Runner-up 36 hour hackathon with cash prize 15000. IPL Auction Winners Innovibe Expo Winners The Intellia Paper Presentation Secured 3rd Place GEN Brainincs Winners 24-hour Hackathon with cash award of Rs.10,000 Hack the Horizon Hackathon Winner ( Cash prize 15,000) National Hackathon Secured Second Place with cash Reward Rs.7000 Techathon 2k25 Winners 24-hour Hackathon with cash award Rs.25,000 Won Second Prize with Cash Award Rs.25,000 Winner ( Cash prize 15,000) Quest Ingenium Hackathon Winner (2 Lakhs cash prize) Hack Beyond Limits – Rathinam College Won the 24-hour hackathon, earning ₹30,000 worth of gift vouchers for their problem-solving skills. Kanam 2025 – Runners-up Thamilarasan G P, Majid Husain J, and Tharan A (2nd-year IT) secured Runners-up at Kanam 2025 Project Expo hosted by Dr. NGP Institute of Technology. i-Cube Hackathon – Special Mention Award Rajat Jaiswal, Sri Ram, Sridharan, and Shasty Venkatesh (2nd-year AI&DS) won a Special Mention Award at the i-Cube Hackathon for their innovative green-tech project. Hack the Future – Silver Winners SanJai L (IV-AI&DS) and Abinaya S (IV-CSE) won Silver at the Hack the Future hackathon by Devpost, earning $650 (~₹55,000) and $1,000 in Patreon credits. Digital India RISC-V Symposium 2025 – IIT Madras Secured Second Place with a cash prize of ₹35,000 at IIT Madras, showcasing excellence in cutting-edge technology. AIQUBIT Tech Fest 2K25 – Karpagam Academy Winners of the prestigious AIQUBIT competition, proving their expertise in IT and innovation. VISAI 2025 – Vel Tech University Achieved 1st, 2nd & 3rd positions in technical and non-technical events at Vel Tech University under sustainability initiatives. Health-Hack at VIT Bhopal Secured 4th place in a competition featuring over 300+ teams, in collaboration with Johns Hopkins University. Maker’s Arena – 24-Hour Hardware Hackathon Innovators behind a sustainable shore energy project, winning ₹3 lakhs in funding from StartupTN. MESCIA 2K25 – Paper Presentation Winners of the competition at Kongu Engineering College, bagging a cash prize of ₹1,500. National Science Day Project Exhibition 2025 Secured 1st Prize at the National Radio Astronomy Center, Ooty, for an outstanding project exhibition. Paper Presentation at KIT 3rd Runner-Up at Kalaignarkarunanidhi Institute of Technology for an impactful research presentation. Paper Presentation at Hindustan College Secured First Place for an innovative research paper on cybersecurity. SheLeads – Idea Pitch Achieved 4th place in the idea pitch competition at the 50th Park Institution of Innovation. Unplugged 2.0 – 24-Hour Hardware Hackathon Secured 3rd place with a cash prize of ₹20,000, showcasing innovation and technical prowess. Yugam 2025 – Think, Solve, and Win Secured 2nd prize in a strategic problem-solving contest at Kumaraguru College. DAKSH AI Hackathon at SASTRA University Winner of the AI-based hackathon at SASTRA, earning a ₹20,000 cash award for technological innovation. Udayam 25 Paper Presentation Winners of the paper presentation competition at KIT, earning a ₹3,000 cash prize for their research excellence. KEC Kackathon 25 Runner-up in the 30-hour hackathon at Kongu Engineering College, receiving ₹5,000 in cash for their innovative EduTech solutions. Anveshan 2024 – Analog Devices Panel Choice Award Secured the prestigious Panel Choice Award at Anveshan 2024, winning ₹50,000 in cash for their outstanding innovation alongside IITs and NITs. KCE-Dhruva Secured 2nd place 5-hour hackathon. Dhruva Winner -AI Doom (Paper Presentation) Dhruva Winner (Creative Caster “Prompt Wizard”) Kackathon'25 Winners of the Medical Domain, securing a ₹7,000 cash prize. Dhruva Winner of Pixel Perfect (Figma UI/UX Designing) Dhruva Winner (Project Expo) Tecquora 2025 Best Paper Presentation Award Execute 4.0 Hackathon Secured Top 6th Position Among 2800+ Teams All over India in the prestigious All-India Hackathon KCE - Dhruva Second Place (Virtual Treasure Hunt) Fiestaa'25 Winner (Paper Presentation) Dhruva Winner with Cash Prize Rs.5000. NIT - Techgyan Winner (Hackathon) Qubitron 2k25 Winner (Paper Presentation) Dhruva Winner (Project Expo) Dhruva Winner (Tech AI Expo) Dhruva 2nd place KCE Hackathon -2025 Dhruva Winner Fiestaa'25 Winner (Paper Presentation) Dhruva Winner (Technical Quiz) Dhruva Winner (Technical Connection) Dhruva Winner (Paper Presentation) Dhruva Second Place (Skill Space Paper Presentation) Fiestaa'25 Winner (Technical Quiz) Hackathon'25 Winner (AI Conclave) Cash Prize Rs.10000 Hackathon'25 Second place (30 Hour Hackathon) with cash prize Rs.5000 Panchamitra 25 Winner (Solo Singing) Texperia'25 Winner (Ideathon) NARL-ISRO Secured Internship @NARL-ISRO out of 296 Candidate Inno Hack Industry 5.0 Winner (Cash Prize Rs.10000) Kriya 2025 Second Place Tancams Hackathon Winner (Cash Award Rs.10000) Analog And Degital Design Hackathon Secured 6th position (Gift Worth Rs.20000) Circuit Debugging Technical Symposium Winner Hackathon'25 Winners (Cash Prize Rs.10000) Unstop Talent Meet 2025 One of the top 10 unstoppable campus ambassadors IIT's Mint Hackathon Out of 172 teams from 5 southern states IIT's MInt Hackathon Out of 172 teams from 5 southern states IIT Guwahati Internship Opportunity First student from Sri Eshwar to secure Internship Microsoft Campus Connect Quiz 2024 Eshwarites place in the top 100 out of 1lakh participants I-Tech Hackfest -2024 9th place out of 250 teams. Cash award ₹10,000/- Ninjacart AgriTech Hackathon 2024 Won cash prize of Rs. 50,000/- National Level Hackathon Secured 6th Position among 250+ teams IEEE - PROJECT EXPO 2024 Win 2nd Prize with a cash award of Rs.7500 NASSCOM Grand India Challenge Win 2nd Prize IEEE CASS International Symposium (AI Fusion 2024) Secured 1st position with Cash Award Aitch nu Global Technologies 6 month Internship Winner of Ai Speech Hackthon Fossee IIT Bombay Presents Animate 2024 13th Place out of 1000+ Teams Anna University Zone 10 Chess Tournament Women’s Team Secured 3rd Place Anna University Zone 10 Chess Tournament Checkmate Champions Anokha Ideathon 2024 Runners up Cellbot Heathcare Jam 2024 Team Drastic Innovators winners 3rd State Sambo Championship 2024 G.Vignesvaran Securing a 1st place Codebyte Hackathon 3rd year CCE Students secured 5th postion among 2340 participants Hackfest 2k24 Grabbed 3rd place standing out among 200+ teams The Grand Tech Carnival Project Expo 1st Position with cash reward Growbinar The Future Tech AI Hackathon Secured 2nd Runner up with Cash Reward NEC Startup Entrepreneurship Summit 2024 Secured 2nd position out of 1050 Participants with their Innovative Startup idea with Cash Reward E-Bike Design Challenge 2024 Team Electric Thrivers secured t Runner-up in Hill- Climb Test Award Decentralized Solar Energy Generation Hackthon Winners with Cash Reward Krishnecs 2k24 Team falcon flies secured 3rd place in Drone Racing Tata Technologies Innovent Standing Tall Among 2800+ Teams Hack Summit 2024 Runner up 50,000 Cash Reward Dr.APJ Abdul Kalam Silver Innovator Award Team Pentium Predators standing amng 300+ Teams with Cash Prize Rs.10,000 Ekklesia'24 National Level Symposium Secured 2nd place with cash reward Codebyte Hackathon 2nd position among 2340 participants with cash reward Aignite National Hackathon Sri Eshwar AI & ML students won ₹42,500 at the Aignite National Hackathon hosted by Acharya Bangalore Institute of Technology. Techfinix'24 P. Nagasharmila, Final Year CCE student, emerged as the champion in both Paper Presentation and Pitch Fest, winning cash prizes at Techfinix ’24. Inferix'24 Sri Eshwar’s 2nd-year AI & DS students won SlideScapers and were runners-up at Tech Horizon in Inferix ’24. Drestein'24 Sri Eshwar’s 2nd-year AI & DS students won SlideScapers and were runners-up at Tech Horizon in Inferix ’24. Genesis 2k24 Runner up in the Project Expo Hack Hustle Runner up with a Cash Prize. InterOfest2k25 Winners In the paper presentation event InterOfest2k25 3rd in the technical paper presentation Amazon Internship Secured an internship offer at amazon. Vel Tech Incubation Centre The Youngest Entrepreneur & Top Software developer VLSI Circuit Design Hackathon 3rd place with cash reward Tech Knights Codeathon 2024 Team Pentium Predators wins first prize at Tech Knights Codeathon 2024 Tech Knights Codeathon 2024 Team Pentium Predators wins first prize at Tech Knights Codeathon 2024 Inferix'24 technical symposium Winners Futurepreneur 2024 Secured 2nd place with cash prize Code Insomania Winners Capture the Flag Competition Winners Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Team Black Squad selected as one of the 1350 finalist teams among 49,892 nominated teams across india Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Team Hacksmithsv2 selected as one of the 1350 finalist teams among 49,892 nominated teams across india Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Team Vulnheist selected as one of the 1350 finalist teams among 49,892 nominated teams across india Smart India Hackathon Grand Finale 2024 Runner up IGEN Research Membership Certificate & IGEN Industry Innovations Collaboration order To Tackle 52 Problem Statements Celebrating Excellence in Sustainability - IGEN Awards 2024 Santhosh E.M. and Dhanusuya K. (III Year CSBS) received the Youth Iconic Award at the IGEN Sustainability Champion Awards 2024, held at Anna University, Chennai. The event honored contributions to sustainable development. Yuva Sangam Phase 5 Under The EK Bharat Shreshtha Bharat (EBSB) program by NITTTR Chennai, hosted by IIM Jammu. Avishkaar Season 2 National level 48Hrs Hackathon by Geeks for Geeks Third-year ECE students Pavan Khalyan, Hariharan, and Vigneshkumar triumphed in AVISHKAAR Season 2, a national-level 48-hour hackathon by Geeks for Geeks, securing a cash prize of ₹1.25 lakhs. The CATERPILLAR Autonomy Challenge @IIT Madras Rajkumar N S, Nitish M, Saravanakumar G, Angelin Sharmell E, and Sivasathya S have been shortlisted for the finals of The Caterpillar Autonomy Challenge at IIT Madras, demonstrating exceptional innovation and teamwork. Futurepreneur 2024 Secured 3 place with cash prize PEC Hacks 2.0 Team Technitiz, comprising Aswath CM, Aadhavan P, Muruga Perumal R, Cibiya N, and Nithin Kumar, claimed victory at PEC Hacks 2.0, winning a remarkable ₹1 lakh cash prize with their innovative solutions. International Collegiate Programming Contest (ICPC) Chennai Regional 2024 Sakthi Narayanan R, Pagalavan M, and Naveen Kumar S secured 10th in Tamil Nadu & 90th in India, continuing SECE’s streak of excellence.
